steps.t: Gûshida has given you a formula which can help the animals. Find the ingredients across the Upper Ward of Umbar Baharbêl.
You have gathered most of the ingredients you need. Now you need fresh water and honey from a vendor that Gûshida recommended. Gûshida's vendor is in …
You have created enough remedy and should give it to the animals in Ezôti's hiding place. Ezôti's hiding place is inside the Upper Ward of Umbar Bahar…
You have given doses of remedy to each animal, and they all seem better for it. You should report to Gûshida. Gûshida can be found where you first met…
